name: World of Towers
short_description: World of Towers combines puzzles with tower defense. Design your base in order to collect all of the puzzle pieces and destroy your enemies. Create and share your own worlds on the Steam Workshop using the World of Towers World Builder
detailed_description:
Puzzle Tower Defense

Design your base in order to
  1. Prevent your enemies from reaching their goals
  2. Force your enemies to walk into traps that explode and destroy them

Create and Share Your Own Worlds

Use the World of Towers World Builder to create and share your worlds through the Steam workshop

More than 50 campaign levels and unlimited community levels
